content:
# Somalia

**Summary**: A country in East Africa with significant groundwater resources.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] studied the management of groundwater resources across various aquifers in Somalia.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] East African Rift System influence.

## Formations Present

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] shabelle-formation, juba-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- Somalia is an arid country receiving approximately 300 mm of annual rainfall. ([[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993, p. 22]])
